library.description: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3: النوافذ، الإدخال، الأحداث، الصوت، والرسم الأساسي.

kind.description: توسعات نصية أو قيم توليدية يطبقها المعالج المسبق قبل الترجمة.

identity.name: SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN
identity.titleArabic:
Add a note that your application has dynamic shared library
dependencies

summary.actualTranslationArabic:
Add a note that your application has dynamic shared library
dependencies
summary.actualMeaningArabic: يمثل هذا الماكرو ماكرو SDL ELF NOTE DLOPEN، أي توسعاً نصياً أو قيمة توليدية تؤثر في الكود قبل الترجمة.
summary.carriedValueArabic:
الماكرو يوسع إلى #define SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN(feature, description, priority, ...) \
 SDL_ELF_NOTE_INTERNAL( \
 "[{\"feature\":\"" feature \
 "\",\"description\":\"" description \
 "\",\"priority\":\"" priority \
 "\",\"soname\":" SDL_DLNOTE_JSON_ARRAY(__VA_ARGS__) "}]", \
 SDL_DLNOTE_UNIQUE_NAME); أو إلى تعبير مشتق منه، والقيمة الحقيقية هنا هي المعنى الذي يضيفه هذا التوسع إلى الكود.
summary.sourceDescription:
Add a note that your application has dynamic shared library
dependencies.

signature.raw:
#define SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN(feature, description, priority, ...) \
 SDL_ELF_NOTE_INTERNAL( \
 "[{\"feature\":\"" feature \
 "\",\"description\":\"" description \
 "\",\"priority\":\"" priority \
 "\",\"soname\":" SDL_DLNOTE_JSON_ARRAY(__VA_ARGS__) "}]", \
 SDL_DLNOTE_UNIQUE_NAME);

remarks: You can do this by adding the following to the global scope:

SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN (
 "png" ,
 "Support for loading PNG images using libpng (required for APNG)" ,
 SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN_PRIORITY_RECOMMENDED ,
 "libpng12.so.0"
 )
 A trailing semicolon is not needed.

Or if you support multiple versions of a library, you can list
them:

// Our app supports SDL1, SDL2, and SDL3 by dynamically loading them
 SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN (
 "SDL" ,
 "Create windows through SDL video backend" ,
 SDL_ELF_NOTE_DLOPEN_PRIORITY_REQUIRED
 "libSDL-1.2.so.0" , "libSDL2-2.0.so.0" , "libSDL3.so.0"
 )
 This macro is not available for compilers that do not support
variadic macro's.
